docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY JOHNSON, KATIE WONG, JAMIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, KATIE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JAMIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER DEFENDANT. "WRONG PARTY SUED. PLAINTIFF CAN CHOOSE TO SUE CORPORATION AS CORRECT DEFENDANT", JUDGE LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED NOV-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JAMIE
